name: whisper-poke
description: Push-to-talk voice overlay that sends voice notes to Poke on Telegram

scripts.build:preload: esbuild src/preload/overlay-preload.ts src/preload/settings-preload.ts src/preload/login-preload.ts src/preload/mic-test-preload.ts src/preload/quicksend-preload.ts --bundle --platform=node --external:electron --format=cjs --outdir=dist/preload
scripts.build:renderer: esbuild src/renderer/overlay/overlay.ts src/renderer/settings/settings.ts src/renderer/login/login.ts src/renderer/mic-test/mic-test.ts src/renderer/quicksend/quicksend.ts --bundle --platform=browser --format=iife --outdir=dist/renderer --sourcemap
scripts.build: npm run build:main && npm run build:preload && npm run build:renderer && npm run copy:html

author: WhisperPoke contributors
